mapper.select: SELECT message_id, user_id, message_type, title, content, is_read, related_id, create_time, read_time FROM message WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (user_id, message_type, title, content, is_read, related_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{messageType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{isRead}, #{relatedId})
mapper.update: UPDATE message SET is_read = 1, read_time = NOW() WHERE message_id = #{messageId}
